title: AI Thinks? Really? Show Me.
synopsis: Through a choose-your-own mystery adventure, you and a quirky AI sidekick solve puzzles that reveal how artificial intelligence actually processes information — no magic involved. By the end you will have built a simple decision tree that makes choices the same way a real AI does.
rationale: Without a concrete, accurate model of what AI is, young learners default to science-fiction extremes — either fearing AI as all-powerful or dismissing it as a simple toy — neither of which prepares them for responsible use.
learning_outcome: Students can distinguish AI from human thinking, explain what a pattern and a decision tree are, and construct a working decision tree that solves a simple real-world problem.
source_signals: What Is AI? | Learn all about artificial intelligence
